CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-09-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment As To Defendant Houdini, Inc.
Off Calendar Jan-24-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Chris Tuttle of the law offices of The Chanler Group (415.263.6511) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF DR. WHITNEY LEEMAN Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment As To Defendant Houdini, Inc. is GRANTED. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Written order and Judgment are signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D302)
